source: LVSlotPro repo Slots/<slug>/ — edit and run npm run slots:sync

guide_seed.title: Ainsworth Must Hit By
guide_seed.card_ev_threshold: Uniform mystery band — verify rise % vs WOO target tables

ap.volatility_summary: Paired minors/majors: meter climb feeds base-game RTP; jackpot path swings hard.
ap.popularity_summary: Common installs where Aristocrat-linked banks appear — verify your property.
edge_vectors: Treat reset/cap/eligibility photography as primary; midpoint math only after uniform band is credible.
ap.bankroll_angle: Size for chasing while eating base-game variance between mystery hits.
verification_checklist: Photo both ladders and denomination / max-bet rules.
Confirm increment scope (bonus vs base-only) per title.
common_pitfalls: Modeling AGS or other OEM meters with Ainsworth uniform assumptions.
Applying one bank’s thresholds to unrelated titles.
ap.nerf_angle: **Medium** — jurisdictional ladders and reset floors shift year to year.
